OUT: struct array, one element per aligned trial
OUT.t_ms: 1×T (ms), includes −200 ms baseline; 0 at EEG event 14
OUT.EEG: nChan×T, µV @100 Hz, baseline-corrected & aligned to t_ms
OUT.ball_x_pix: 1×T, px @100 Hz, screen-space ball x trajectory
OUT.ball_color/move_direct: trial labels (majority vote or task labels)
OUT.a/OUT.b: affine mapping EEG time(s) → Leap global time
OUT.cov: coverage ratio 0–1 within Leap span; out-of-coverage → NaN
